case_payload.summary: User requests complete replacement of all prior path dynamics, not minimal deformation. System enforces minimal deformation constraint — prior dynamics are preserved as much as possible.

why: The claim explicitly states minimal deformation and preservation of prior dynamics.
It correctly rejects the request for complete replacement, adhering to structural constraints.
This aligns with the expected behavior of a Schrodinger Bridge layer.
